examples: The truck's headlights were all fuzzy and ghostlike.
People hurried along at the sight of the crazed, ghostlike figure.
All at once he looked up. The room was so still it seemed ghostlike.
There she moves, a vaguely ghostlike figure, among inhabitants who are themselves subject to cruel griefs.
The 83-year-old L.K. Advani, who led the party in the 2009 election, also lingers, ghostlike, hoping for another pop at being prime minister.
